suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that when a behavior-fix necessarily invalidates an existing stale test expectation, workers may update that existing test if the change is narrowly required to reflect the corrected behavior and new regression coverage is still added.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `fix-ai-selector-action-validation` review passed, but the worker had to update `apps/browser-executor/src/aiActionSelector.test.ts` because it still asserted malformed JSON should reject. The handoff explicitly documented this justified deviation, and the re-review confirmed the updated expectation now matches the corrected recovery behavior.
